message:
feat: Add corruption detection and smart tier selection to context pool

Adopted two patterns from edgebox's instance_pool.zig:

1. needsRealloc() - Detects corrupted contexts with mismatched tier
   configuration. Acquire() now skips these during pool scans.

2. acquireForTokens(n) - Auto-selects the smallest tier that fits
   the token requirement, instead of requiring callers to manually
   map token counts to tier indices.

Both features improve robustness and usability of the context pool.
